title: Streamertools
description: Connect Minecraft with your Twitch stream and bring your viewers directly into the game with chat, alerts, and interactive features.
body:
🎥 Streamertools Mod

Version: 1.21.8 | Platform: Fabric / Paper (planned)

🧩 Description

The Streamertools Mod is built specifically for streamers who want to make their Minecraft streams more interactive, modern, and easier to manage.
It connects your Twitch or YouTube stream directly to Minecraft — bringing your viewers closer to the action than ever before.

⚙️ Features

💬 Chat Integration: Connect your Twitch or YouTube chat directly into Minecraft.

🎁 Giveaways & Events: Start chat-based giveaways and events straight from the game.

🔔 In-Game Alerts: Show live alerts (followers, subs, donations) inside your Minecraft HUD.

📊 Viewer Info: Display current viewer count and active chat users in real time.

🎮 Streamer Commands: Useful in-game commands for moderation, shoutouts, breaks, and more.

⚡ Integration with Streamertools Dashboard: Syncs automatically with your external Streamertools Dashboard (Twitch, YouTube, Kick).

🧠 Extensible API: Built with expandability in mind — supports addons and server-side integration.

🧠 Planned Features

🪙 In-game currency for viewer interactions

🎯 Interactive polls directly via chat

🧰 Paper server compatibility

🌐 WebSocket connection for real-time synchronization with the Streamertools Bot

🧑‍💻 Developer

by vwtfafa
